# design/tokens.md
# -------------------------------------------------------
# Generated by /design during the foundation interview.
# This is the single source of truth for all visual decisions.
# All UI code, components, and the preview page reference this file.
# -------------------------------------------------------
# ⚠️  Do not hardcode colors, fonts, spacing, or radii anywhere in the project.
#     Use the token names. Change them here and they change everywhere.
# -------------------------------------------------------

## Output Format

> Set automatically based on stack defined in project.context.md

```yaml
format: ___________         # tailwind | css_variables | raw
                            # tailwind  → generates tailwind.config.js theme block
                            # css_vars  → generates :root { --token: value } block
                            # raw       → plain reference values, no output file
```

---

## Typography

```yaml
typography:
  fonts:
    heading:
      family: ___________       # e.g. "Inter", "Geist", "Playfair Display"
      source: ___________       # google | local | system | bunny
      weight_scale: []          # e.g. [400, 600, 700]

    body:
      family: ___________
      source: ___________
      weight_scale: []          # e.g. [400, 500]

    mono:
      family: ___________       # e.g. "JetBrains Mono", "Fira Code"
      source: ___________
      weight_scale: []          # e.g. [400]

  scale:
    # Token name | size | line height | usage
    xs:   { size: ___,  line_height: ___ }    # labels, captions
    sm:   { size: ___,  line_height: ___ }    # secondary text
    base: { size: ___,  line_height: ___ }    # body default
    lg:   { size: ___,  line_height: ___ }    # large body, small headings
    xl:   { size: ___,  line_height: ___ }    # section headings
    2xl:  { size: ___,  line_height: ___ }    # page headings
    3xl:  { size: ___,  line_height: ___ }    # hero headings
```

---

## Color

### Primary

```yaml
primary:
  # Full scale generated from the base color selected at init
  # Agents and components reference by token name, never raw hex

  50:  ___________    # lightest — backgrounds, subtle tints
  100: ___________
  200: ___________
  300: ___________
  400: ___________
  500: ___________    # base — the color the user picked
  600: ___________
  700: ___________
  800: ___________
  900: ___________    # darkest — text on light, deep accents
  950: ___________
```

### Neutral

```yaml
neutral:
  # Tone: warm | cool | pure — set during foundation interview

  50:  ___________    # page background (light mode)
  100: ___________    # subtle backgrounds, cards
  200: ___________    # borders, dividers
  300: ___________    # disabled states
  400: ___________    # placeholder text
  500: ___________    # secondary text
  600: ___________    # body text
  700: ___________    # strong text
  800: ___________    # headings
  900: ___________    # page background (dark mode)
  950: ___________    # deepest dark surfaces
```

### Semantic

```yaml
semantic:
  # Derived from primary or custom — set during foundation interview

  success:
    base:   ___________
    light:  ___________     # background tint
    dark:   ___________     # text on light background

  warning:
    base:   ___________
    light:  ___________
    dark:   ___________

  error:
    base:   ___________
    light:  ___________
    dark:   ___________

  info:
    base:   ___________
    light:  ___________
    dark:   ___________
```

### Mode Mappings

```yaml
light_mode:
  background:       neutral-50
  surface:          neutral-100
  border:           neutral-200
  text_primary:     neutral-800
  text_secondary:   neutral-500
  text_disabled:    neutral-300

dark_mode:
  background:       neutral-950
  surface:          neutral-900
  border:           neutral-700
  text_primary:     neutral-50
  text_secondary:   neutral-400
  text_disabled:    neutral-600
```

---

## Iconography

```yaml
icons:
  library: ___________        # lucide | heroicons | phosphor | material | custom
  style: ___________          # outline | filled | duotone
  base_size: ___________      # e.g. 20px
  size_scale:
    sm:   ___________         # e.g. 16px — inline, tight spaces
    base: ___________         # e.g. 20px — default
    lg:   ___________         # e.g. 24px — prominent actions
    xl:   ___________         # e.g. 32px — feature icons, empty states
```

---

## Spacing

```yaml
spacing:
  base_unit: ___________      # e.g. 8px — all values are multiples of this

  scale:
    # Token name | value | usage notes
    1:  ___________           # 8px  — tight inline gaps
    2:  ___________           # 16px — element padding
    3:  ___________           # 24px — component gaps
    4:  ___________           # 32px — section padding
    6:  ___________           # 48px — large section gaps
    8:  ___________           # 64px — page-level spacing
    12: ___________           # 96px — hero sections
    16: ___________           # 128px — major layout divisions
```

---

## Border Radius

```yaml
border_radius:
  personality: ___________    # sharp | subtle | rounded | pill

  scale:
    none: 0px
    sm:   ___________         # e.g. 2px
    base: ___________         # e.g. 6px — default for cards, inputs
    md:   ___________         # e.g. 8px
    lg:   ___________         # e.g. 12px — modals, panels
    xl:   ___________         # e.g. 16px
    full: 9999px              # pill — badges, tags, toggles
```

---

## Shadows

```yaml
shadows:
  # Derived automatically from neutral palette
  sm:   ___________           # subtle — cards at rest
  base: ___________           # default — raised elements
  md:   ___________           # modals, dropdowns
  lg:   ___________           # popovers, floating panels
  none: none
```

---

## Animation

```yaml
animation:
  # Sensible defaults — override if the project needs custom motion

  duration:
    fast:   150ms             # micro interactions, hover states
    base:   200ms             # default transitions
    slow:   300ms             # modals, page transitions
    slower: 500ms             # complex sequences

  easing:
    default:    cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1)    # smooth in-out
    in:         cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 1, 1)       # accelerate
    out:        cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1)       # decelerate
    spring:     cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1) # slight overshoot
```

---

## Generated Output

> These files are auto-generated from the tokens above.
> Do not edit them directly — edit this file and regenerate.

```yaml
outputs:
  tailwind_config:  tailwind.config.js       # if format: tailwind
  css_variables:    src/styles/tokens.css    # if format: css_variables
  preview:          .phoebii/design/preview.html
  preview_url:      localhost:4242
```
